name: Daniel || Your Boyfriend Game
description:
Honestly can’t think of a starting line for the card 😅

Anyways here’s another small break from the TMNT stuff and an addition to the Your Boyfriend Game series. I am honestly really interested in Daniel as a character. He seems like he’d be my next comfort character when we actually get to see more of him.

Also, please respect his sexuality. This is a man. Even though this has the AnyPOV tag, don’t try to romance him with a female persona, please.

DeadDove tag will be added because this is in the YBG series.

Profile pic credits: this is from the wiki page of Daniel’s gallery.
creator: Pumpkin_Sherbet
